overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban plaza. The player moves from a covered area under an elevated highway through a bustling pedestrian zone with distinctive teal-colored pavement, modern architecture, and dense crowds of NPCs. Bright midday sunlight illuminates the scene with vivid colors and high-contrast shadows.

events.description: exits covered walkway and approaches pedestrian crosswalk with visible traffic

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass toward the street crossing, passing yellow bollards

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with support pillars dominating the upper frame
thick orange-brown concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway
yellow striped crosswalk markings on the pavement
tall futuristic building with reflective glass facade visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive elevated highway structure with concrete pillars casting strong shadows. The camera moves forward toward a pedestrian crosswalk where a purple futuristic car is parked. The environment transitions from the sheltered covered walkway toward an open intersection with modern buildings visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with seating and tree planters alongside commercial building

segments.scene_description: Moving from the shadow of the overpass into bright sunlight, the scene opens into a pedestrian plaza with a large concrete building on the left. The ground transitions to distinctive teal pavement with colorful graffiti. NPCs sit on curved benches near tree planters while the camera continues forward past the Embers building signage.

events.description: crowd density increases as approaching central plaza area with large digital billboard

tall modern high-rise buildings with glass facades and construction cranes
small outdoor food vendor structure with green awning

segments.scene_description: The plaza opens up wide with the camera moving through an area featuring colorful ground graffiti and scattered groups of pedestrians. Large tree planters and benches line the walkway while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the background. A prominent orange digital billboard structure becomes visible in the distance as the crowd density increases.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy pedestrian intersection with large advertising displays

events.description: crossing a marked pedestrian crosswalk through moving crowd
slight turn to the left while navigating through dense pedestrian traffic

agents.ego_description: navigating through a dense crowd of pedestrians while crossing the plaza intersection, passing various NPCs

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the plaza near the billboard structure
small kiosk structure with advertisements on the right side
vertical digital billboard displaying product advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a densely populated area of the plaza with many pedestrians walking in various directions. The large orange digital billboard structure dominates the center view, surrounded by palm trees. The ground transitions to a crosswalk pattern as the player navigates through the crowd, passing street vendors and advertisement screens.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under overpass with fluorescent lighting

events.description: enters covered walkway under overpass with artificial fluorescent lighting
lighting shifts from bright natural sun to dim artificial fluorescent tubes

agents.ego_description: walking through a crowded covered walkway under the overpass, surrounded by many pedestrians moving in the same direction

entered.detail: enclosed pedestrian path underneath the highway with concrete walls and ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment transitions into a covered walkway beneath the overpass, where fluorescent lights replace natural sunlight. The space becomes enclosed with concrete walls and ceiling, while the crowd density remains high with many pedestrians walking in the same direction through the corridor. The vibrant outdoor plaza gives way to this utilitarian passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a shadowed urban underpass into a vibrant, sun-drenched plaza before returning to a sheltered concrete corridor. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway where concrete pillars cast deep shadows, moving forward past a parked purple futuristic car toward an open intersection. As the camera emerges into bright midday sunlight, the environment opens into a pedestrian plaza featuring distinctive teal pavement, colorful graffiti, and NPCs resting on curved benches near the Embers building. The scene then expands further into a wide thoroughfare lined with skyscrapers and palm trees, where the camera navigates through dense crowds toward a prominent orange digital billboard. Finally, the vibrant outdoor light gives way to fluorescent illumination as the camera enters a utilitarian covered walkway, shifting from the open plaza back into an enclosed concrete passage filled with pedestrians.
